name: Lynn C.
subject: Ben Carson just called me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
Peter,

Wow. What a great start to my day.

I just got off the phone with Dr. Carson, who called to
personally thank me for being the 50,000th donor to his
Exploratory Committee.

Last week, when he said he was going to personally call his
50,000th donor, I went ahead and made my second donation of $10,
never thinking it'd be me.

What a nice surprise.

As a nurse for 33 years, I have an incredible amount of respect
for Dr. Carson's medical career. But to me, he is more than just
a great doctor.

A friend once sent me a postcard with a quote from Ronald Reagan
that said, "If we ever forget that we are One Nation Under God,
then we will be a nation gone under."

These words ring particularly true today, as America is in
desperate need of rediscovering our foundational values.

And to me, Dr. Carson's strong faith, conviction, and common
sense approach uniquely position him to lead this American
revival.

During our call I urged Dr. Carson to move forward and run for
President, which I know he will only do if he believes he has the
necessary support.

I will continue to do my part, spreading the word and donating
what I can, and as a fellow supporter of Dr. Carson, I hope you
will do the same.

bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf

Thanks for letting me share my story.

Best regards,

Lynn C.
Leawood, KS

Donate: bencarson.com/explore/landing/bd/page-hf

name: Team Marco
subject: "That is a lot of cell phones!"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41714400:16697707299:m:1:1349778030:749A36D8A60D3134D5016278D9BD9995:r)
---
Peter, Those were the first words Marco spoke -- right after saying "thank you!" \-- as he took the stage last week to announce that he was running for president in order to lead us into a New American Century. And so we turned to our supporters (and their cell phones) to tell the story about Marco's big announcement and why they're supporting him. _**[Click here to watch the video and learn how you can help spread Marco's positive message:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41714401:16697707299:m:1:1349778030:749A36D8A60D3134D5016278D9BD9995:r)**_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41714401:16697707299:m:1:1349778030:749A36D8A60D3134D5016278D9BD9995:r) Since last week, supporters from across the country have been asking for more ways to help Marco and show their support. Joining Marco's Digital Army is a great way to do just that. It's a great way to let your friends, family, and neighbors know you're supporting Marco and start a conversation about his plan to lead us into a New American Century. [_**Click here to see the video and get started.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41714401:16697707299:m:1:1349778030:749A36D8A60D3134D5016278D9BD9995:r) Team Marco
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41714402:16697707299:m:1:1349778030:749A36D8A60D3134D5016278D9BD9995:r)

name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: re: I need to know where you stand today!
body:
Friend, I wanted to make certain that you had a chance to read the email I sent yesterday.

I will make a decision about whether I run for President soon. But Friend, before I do I need to hear from you.

**[Please take a moment to read the email below and show your support by making an instant online contribution following this link.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r)**

Thank you for standing with me at this critical time in our nation's history.

-Lindsey | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

While growing up in my family's restaurant and pool hall in small, blue-collar Central, South Carolina, I never in my wildest dreams thought I might one day run for President.

But today, with such a vital need to secure America's future, I feel it's my duty to consider such an important idea -- I have both the record and the resolve to pursue that high office -- especially at this time when so much is at risk.

If you agree, I hope you'll act upon that conviction by supporting my testing the waters committee, **[Security Through Strength](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r)**.

I know that entering the race for the Republican nomination will be one of the hardest decisions of my life -- a huge, costly commitment of time, money, and effort -- _but it is a challenge I believe I am uniquely qualified to take on_.

If I decide to run, **it will be to win** \-- _not just make a point_. That's why I established **Security Through Strength** \-- to fund my travels around the country as I listen to Americans and gauge my support.

And that's why I'm contacting you, one of my key supporters. Before I make my final decision, I want to know if you stand with me.

**[Will you declare your support now by making a generous contribution of $25, $35, or even $75 to Security Through Strength right away?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r)**

Barack Obama's failed foreign policy of appeasement and retreat have only made things more dangerous for America in an already dangerous world -- and his out-of-control spending, growth of entitlements, and failure to fix our broken immigration system endanger our prosperity as well.

The next President must get our country moving in the right direction and fix what Barack Obama has broken - if you want that person to be me, **[please let me know today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r)**.

Sincerely,

Senator Lindsey Graham

P.S. Friend, I truly owe my success over the years to the strong support of generous friends like you - and I need your input again as I ponder my future. [**Will you step forward with a generous gift to Security Through Strength today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r) Thanks, Lindsey.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27318812:26276810953:m:1:877327319:9D687243C1BDED25C9B4E1B3E24D22BE:r) |

_Security Through Strength is a 527 political organization registered with the Internal Revenue Service._

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW7DQ6C1Ni).
[Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW7DQ6C1Ni) | [Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW7DQ6C1Ni)

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Ignore the latest polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719631:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r)
---
Peter, Even though two new polls released today have Marco in first place in the GOP field, you should ignore it. For two reasons. First, polls 10 months before the election don't matter. Second, and far more importantly, Marco's candidacy isn't about polls... Marco's candidacy is about his message and his vision for a New American Century. Clearly, Marco's message is exciting voters. And as you and I already knew, when people get the opportunity to hear directly from him, that message moves them. That is why I'm writing you today. We're not always going to get tons of free media coverage to get Marco's message out to the voters. Most of the time we're going to have to buy the time. And TV ads are expensive. So we need your help! [_**Click here to donate $7 and help us seize this critical opportunity.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719632:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r) As I remind our team every day: this is a marathon, not a sprint. We've got a lot of work to do and a long way until voters start weighing in. Our job on the campaign is simple: We have to get Marco and his positive, optimistic message in front of as many voters as we possibly can, as often as we can. That's what matters. If we do that, then we'll win. [_**Click here to help us by making a donation.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719632:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r) Terry Sullivan Campaign Manager Marco Rubio for President
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719633:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719634:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41719635:16700410039:m:1:1349778030:CC0C335BBABB18882BBC61D528D1F9F7:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Katie Dowd, Hillary for America
subject: We have a free sticker for you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
It's go time: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjI1MzQ1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNDY5NjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend -- Now there's an easy way to show off just how pumped you are about this campaign: **[your (free!) official Hillary for America bumper sticker](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1MzQ1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNDY5NjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**. [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjI1MzQ1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNDY5NjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1MzQ1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNDY5NjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) These are brand new -- and they're limited edition -- so don't miss out on getting yours now.

They look pretty good on a car, but they'd look just as great on your laptop or on a friend (though you should probably ask your friend first).

**Wherever you're planning on putting it, sign up to get your free sticker right now:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/bumper-sticker/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1MzQ1NzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQyNDY5NjEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
Cheers,

Katie

Katie Dowd
Digital Director
Hillary for America
